title: Petface Planet Carlos the Crocodile Eco Friendly Plush Dog Toy Made From Recycled Plastic Bottles
features: ECO-FRIENDLY: Made from recycled plastic bottles, Planet Carlos Crocodile is a durable plush dog toy that promotes sustainability and interactive play

FUN & ENGAGING: Designed for endless entertainment — simply insert your own plastic bottle to keep your furry friend happily occupied! With a built-in squeaker for extra excitement, your pup will never get bored
PETSAFE MATERIALS: Petface Planet uses eco-friendly materials ensuring a safe and enjoyable play experience for your pet
DURABLE DESIGN: Carlos the crocodile is designed to be tough and long-lasting, making it perfect for interactive play sessions with your pup

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Sustainability Award Winners! The Petface team won the "SUSTAINABILITY AWARD" for 2021 at the Pet Industry Federation awards for Petface Planet. Petface Planet have a range of eco-influenced pet products, carefully sourced from natural and recycled materials. Petface - your pet's best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cats and wild bird for great products! Petface Planet Plush Carlos The Crocodile Dog Toy Treat your pet and save the planet with the Petface Planet range! The Petface Planet Plush Carlos The Crocodile Dog Toy has a space inside to add your used plastic drinks bottle (not included), which then acts as the crocodiles body, adding a great crunching noise when your dog picks it up. Made from recycled bottles, its soft, plush texture makes this toy the perfect cuddly companion and playmate all in one! Materials: Recycled Polyester. Petface Planet Plush Carlos The Crocodile Dog Toy ABOUT PETFACE Petface Planet is a range of eco, eco-influenced pet products, carefully sourced from sustainable natural and recycled materials, with transparent traceability. Across the UK we use on average 7.8 billion plastic bottles every year, which is around 117 bottles per person or 2 Petface Planet large Eco Hex Pet Beds! YOUR DOG'S BEST FRIEND All your needs are covered with the Petface range, including collars, leads, toys, feeding, coats and bedding. The designers at Petface have ensured the range has a co-ordinated look and style making sure your pets will be the ‘best dressed in town’. RAINFOREST RANGE Inspired by our world’s endangered ecosystems, the debut “Rainforest Range” highlights animals living within the biodiversity of rainforest habitats. Featuring bright and colourful products, made from recycled plastic, vegetable-based materials, natural rubber and wood.
